nasb.text: Is My inheritance like a speckled bird of prey to Me? Are the birds of prey against her on every side? Go, gather all the beasts of the field, Bring them to devour!

esv.text: Is my heritage to me like a hyena’s lair? Are the birds of prey against her all around? Go, assemble all the wild beasts; bring them to devour.

cnv.text: 我的產業對我，不就像一隻帶斑點的鷙鳥， 其他的鷙鳥都四圍攻擊她？ 你們去聚集田野各樣的走獸， 帶牠們來吃吧！

ccb.text: 我的子民就像一只带斑点的鸷鸟， 被其他鸷鸟围攻。 招聚野兽来吞吃它吧！
